description: A 20-tooth spur gear with a star-polygon tooth profile, an extended cylindrical hub, a central bore, a keyway, and a radial set screw hole through the hub.
notes: Create the gear tooth profile using a star polygon with 20 points alternating between radius 24mm (tip) and 20mm (root). Extrude the gear from Z=0 to Z=10. The hub is a cylinder of radius 8mm from Z=0 to Z=30. The central bore is a cylinder of radius 5mm from Z=0 to Z=30. The keyway slot is a box of width 4mm (Y) and depth 2.5mm (X from 5 to 7.5), running the full Z length. The set screw hole is a cylinder of radius 2mm aligned with the X-axis at Z=20, subtracted from the hub.
